title: populus rotundifolia var. macranthela
intro: Populus rotundifolia var. macranthela, also known as the narrowleaf cottonwood, is a tree species native to North America. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Populus rotundifolia var. macranthela include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
